name: SPM-enriched marine oil healthy-volunteer crossover study
summary: A randomized double-blind placebo-controlled crossover study in healthy volunteers testing acute dose-response effects of enriched marine oil on peripheral SPMs and leukocyte responses.
population: Healthy volunteers aged 18 to 45 years in the registry; 22 participants completed the crossover study

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Resolution Pathway and Tissue Repair because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, mechanistic endpoints, and safety in Healthy volunteers aged 18 to 45 years in the registry; 22 participants completed the crossover study. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
